message:
feat(watcher): integrate scheduled backups into observation runtime

Add automatic scheduled backup execution to wa watcher mode:

main.rs (+313 lines):
- Start scheduled backup task when config.backup.scheduled.enabled
- run_scheduled_backups() async function with full lifecycle:
  - Parse schedule from config (cron or keyword)
  - Calculate next_run using BackupSchedule::next_after()
  - Sleep until next scheduled time with shutdown awareness
  - Execute backup via wa_core::backup::export()
  - Send desktop notification on success/failure
  - Prune old backups per max_backups config
  - Loop until shutdown signal received
- wait_for_shutdown() helper for clean cancellation
- Graceful shutdown: awaits backup task completion
- Notification includes backup path and file count

Cargo.toml:
- Add chrono dependency for schedule timing

README.md:
- Document scheduled backup configuration
- Example config.toml section

This enables hands-off automated backups during long wa watcher sessions
with configurable schedule, retention, and desktop notifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -304,6 +304,23 @@ writer_queue_size = 100
 # How long to retain captured output
 retention_days = 30
 
+[backup.scheduled]
+# Enable scheduled backups
+enabled = false
+# Schedule: hourly, daily, weekly, or 5-field cron
+schedule = "daily"
+# Retention policy
+retention_days = 30
+max_backups = 10
+# Optional destination root
+destination = "~/.local/share/wa/backups"
+# Optional tweaks
+compress = false
+metadata_only = false
+# Notifications
+notify_on_failure = true
+notify_on_success = false
+
 [patterns]
 # Which detection packs to enable
 packs = ["core"]

@@ -21,6 +21,7 @@ workspace = true
 [dependencies]
 wa-core.workspace = true
 clap.workspace = true
+chrono.workspace = true
 serde.workspace = true
 serde_json.workspace = true
 tokio.workspace = true
